title: Directive Catalog — Net-New Directive Candidates
summary: Prior-art survey grounding the #1975 directive-catalog epic and its child admission gates (#1976 async region, #1978 error boundary, #1979 virtualized iteration, #1980 snippet+render, #1981 content-security zones). Catalogues ~90 deduped composition capabilities across 16 categories against the framework field (Svelte/Solid/Vue/React/Lit/Marko/Qwik/Angular/Astro) and the web-platform substrates (DOM Parts, Template Instantiation, the Sanitizer API + Trusted Types, content-visibility + IntersectionObserver), tagging each built / proposed / net-new and placing it on the tree-shape↔computation line. Establishes the directive test (operates on a region or tree-shape; not a behavior, not a component) and the form axis (Ⓒ comment-anchor for live regions · Ⓣ template for inert-until-stamped · Ⓐ structural-annotation for body-less metadata). Each net-new candidate is judged for admission at the #1963 framework-parity bar and pinned to the standards-track substrate it must deprecate and migrate toward.
